---
title: "DataGangeR Comparison Report"
output: html_document
params:
  comparison: !r NULL
  privacy: !r NULL
  synthetic_summary: !r NULL
  purpose: !r NULL
  generated_at: !r NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
comparison <- params$comparison
privacy <- params$privacy
summary_info <- params$synthetic_summary
```

# Bundle Summary

- Purpose: `r params$purpose`
- Generated at: `r params$generated_at`
- Synthetic rows: `r summary_info$n_rows`
- Synthetic columns: `r summary_info$n_cols`

## Synthetic Column Classes

```{r synthetic-classes, echo=FALSE}
class_tbl <- data.frame(
  variable = names(summary_info$classes),
  class = unname(summary_info$classes),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
knitr::kable(class_tbl)
```

## Dataset Metrics

```{r dataset-metrics, echo=FALSE}
if (is.null(comparison)) {
  cat("No comparison object was supplied.\n")
} else {
  knitr::kable(comparison$dataset)
}
```

## Numeric Comparison

```{r numeric-metrics, echo=FALSE}
if (is.null(comparison) || nrow(comparison$numeric) == 0) {
  cat("No numeric comparison rows available.\n")
} else {
  knitr::kable(comparison$numeric)
}
```

## Categorical Comparison

```{r categorical-metrics, echo=FALSE}
if (is.null(comparison) || nrow(comparison$categorical) == 0) {
  cat("No categorical comparison rows available.\n")
} else {
  knitr::kable(comparison$categorical)
}
```

## Relationship Comparison

```{r relationship-metrics, echo=FALSE}
if (is.null(comparison) || nrow(comparison$relationship) == 0) {
  cat("No relationship comparison rows available.\n")
} else {
  knitr::kable(comparison$relationship)
}
```

## Privacy Flags

```{r privacy-flags, echo=FALSE}
if (is.null(privacy) || nrow(privacy) == 0) {
  cat("No privacy flags were supplied for this bundle.\n")
} else {
  knitr::kable(privacy)
}
```
